programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Captain Dobeys determination to heat up a cold case puts him and his family in the crosshairs of a grudge-nursing ex-cop sprung from prison by a corrupt corporate CEO who wants both Dobey and the case put on ice

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When the families of all his Vietnam flight crew are kidnapped including Dom and Cait; Hawke must follow the clues and a mysterious friend to save them

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A commercial psychic uses a mystic hearing aid to read the thoughts of his audience

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Bank robber Tom Birch and his outlaw gang arrive in North Fork where Birch has some unfinished business--he wants to visit his old friend Lucas McCain

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury a criminal arrested by Micah Torrance returns from five years in prison determined to avenge himself upon the town marshal

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E13 Us Haggens
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E13 Us Haggens

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Little Joe is off to buy a gift for his pas birthday Hes unaware that where he is heading the local Indians are on the war path and theyve got him in their gun sights

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles David Janssen anti-smog crusading friend Laurence Naismith has him deliver a package secretly containing a bomb to a polluting factory unaware that children are there

programme.title: Seahunt
programme.desc: While testing the skills of two divers Mike is attacked by one of them whom is suffering from rapture of the deep

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike is asked to investigate when two underwater geologists disappear one of whom washes up on the beach with marks of a struggle with a gigantic octopus

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: An emotionally unstable woman becomes obsessed with the idea that her husband is having an affair

programme.title: Hitchhiker 511
programme.desc: Young man on the brink of success is about to marry the woman of his dreams However his past comes calling

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick chases a psychopath who is burning people alive and tries to protect the targets of the killers rage -- a band of homeless living under the citys streets

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A psychiatrist secretly accounts her miraculous success rate to a unique antique radio that delivers cures and advice during the nightly news

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After teenager Adam is coerced into having a one-night-stand with Loni a girl he meets at a party he finds that shes looking for a more permanent relationship Meanwhile Adams friend Max is forced to abandon his planned summer trip and take a job in a pizza place working under his creepy tyrannical uncle

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy wants to make sure her honeymoon turns out perfect

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Jonas has been forced into mandatory retirement He cant relax though because Anitas friends are driving him crazy

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: What happens when BJ and the Bear transport a circus veteran his granddaughter and their trained elephant through the turf of Wiley and the Fox

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: As Hogan tries to help a German scientist defect bumbling Colonel Crittendon interferes again

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants Klink to forget about a promotion so he plays cupid for him and General Burkhalters sister

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton is ordered to purchase one of Chief Urulus islands for the construction of a radar station But Urulu - Knowing that hes got The Navy over a barrel - Inflates the price of his real estate to ridiculous levels So McHale and The Crew try to help The Captain out with a scheme to de-value The Chiefs land

programme.desc: Mchale 236

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan moves to the other side of the island when the other castaways suddenly become allergic to him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds sunflower seeds on the island that gives him the ability to read minds and when the fellow castaways find out they want in on the action

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Grampa refuses to give him a raise Pepino quits and goes to work for neighbor George MacMichael

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is in desperate need of character witnesses to testify on his behalf at his parking ticket trial

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stephanie collects several parking tickets driving Dicks car but Dick ends up having to pay them

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael hires Stephanie to be the television stations new receptionist but her terrible performance forces him to fire her

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch is alarmed when a child that he saved from drowning six years ago is now a part of a Haitian voodoo cult When Mitch and Ryan investigate they turn to a voodoo priestess Madam Trudor to help them

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane makes a woman look like Hollands wife He makes sure Holland aka Swamp Thing sees her He approaches her and she runs away He later tests her She then asks him for his notes hoping it could help him But Arcane is after one of his formulas At the same time Holland recalls his last moments with his wife and moment when he became Swamp Thing because of Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The expansive Taybor an intergalactic merchant arrives from hyperspace on his ship The Emporium He is offering to sell things to the Alphans Koenig realizes that if the Taybor sold them his spaceship it would enable the Alphans to fly back to Earth but the price the Taybor is asking for this transaction is Maya

programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 26 filmed at the Art Hauser Centre in Prince Albert. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Brendan Mooney vs. Brad Lammy; Tyrone Halkett vs. Brad Campbell; Thomas Richardson vs. Cody Bowman; Evander Masuskapoe vs. Randell Martell; Devon Smith vs. Elias Cepeda.

programme.desc: Tara LaRosa v. Amanda Buckner

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.desc: Xavier Sedras v. Jefferson George

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!

programme.desc: Kes Mamba v. Wesley Johnson
